name: perform_device_action
description: Execute a remote action on a device such as rebooting, shutting down, restarting the application container, or purging application data. The device must be online for the action to take effect.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the target device.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action to perform. One of: reboot, shutdown, restart, purge.
